changelog:
2.2.2

  • Fix partial updates for Elementor archetypes and reusable parts so omitted metadata fields are preserved instead of being cleared
  • Clarify the admin Library model: SPAI archetypes and reusable parts are Elementor templates with SPAI metadata layered on top
  • Carry forward the 2.2.1 shared-host-safe Elementor route improvements and operator workflow features
